title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Any pregnant person is eligible for OMC, regardless of their income or insurance status Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 672-9596 Main phone Main phone (541) 672-9596 Oregon MothersCare Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off NE Stephens Street, across the street from Costco Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Prenatal Care Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PHARMACY HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG
